title: Robust Refreshing Greek Butter Beans Spanakopita
description: A post-workout Greek dish featuring butter beans and spinach, made into a spanakopita with a floral and glassy-jelly texture, using katsuramuki-cut techniques and FODMAP-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the butter beans, spinach, lemon juice, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
Unroll the filo dough and cut it into 4 equal pieces.
Brush each piece of filo dough with olive oil and layer them in a baking dish.
Spoon the butter bean and spinach mixture onto the filo dough, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the filo dough over the filling to form a spanakopita.
Brush the top of the spanakopita with olive oil and sprinkle with chopped dill.
Bake the spanakopita for 35 minutes, or until the filo dough is golden brown.
Remove the spanakopita from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
